raw_note: Post excision today, d/c home well. Keep dressing clean/dry for 48 hrs, then change daily. Avoid heavy lifting/strenuous activity for next few days. May take paracetamol for pain. If Steri-Strips present, leave in place until they fall off or remove after 7 days. Contact GP/practice nurse if increasing redness, swelling, discharge, fever or pain not controlled. Seek urgent help if wound opens significantly or bleeding does not stop with firm pressure.
